message:
feat(installers): add new tool installers and checksums

Expands the verified installer registry with additional flywheel tools:
- rano: Interactive rename tool
- s2p: Source to prompt TUI
- mdwb: Markdown web browser
- tru: Toon Rust utilities
- br: Beads Rust issue tracker
- brenner_bot: Brenner Bot CLI
- rch: Remote Compilation Helper

All installers have verified SHA256 checksums for security.
Checksums regenerated with updated timestamp.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
